/CAL:EXTENSION OF 180 DAY FORFEITURE PERIOD PURSUANT TO PC 1305,4/X:THE COURT IS IN RECEIPT OF AN EMAIL FROM THE SAN FRANCISCO CITY  ATTORNEY DEPICTING CCSF'S NON-OPPOSITION TO THE MOVING PARTIES MOTION,/X:THE COURT GRANTSTHE UNOPPOSED MOTION AND THE ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED GRANTING THE 180 DAYEXTENSION OF THE FORFEITURE PERIOD TO 11-13-20,/X:THE DEFENDANT'S BENCH WARRANT OF 10-13-19 REMAINS OUTSTANDING/

/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/LDPX:05-10-19/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO06-13-19/X: BAIL SET AT $30,000/BAIL IS NOT FORFEITED)/X:DATE OF 06-13-19 SHALL REMAIN AS SET/CONTD:TS PRELIMINARY HEARING & TRAILING/DOPC/
/CAL:TO JOIN 17018438 & 18011155, PRE-PX M12/INTC/LD:05-10-19/CONTD:TRAILING 17018438 & 18011155 IN S23 AND S22/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:I&A, P&C/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1//X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:05-10-19/987,2//ACM/DEF:TO PROVIDE PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:TO JOIN 17018438 & 18011155/DOP/SA4:AREA SURROUNDED BY 11TH STREET, VAN NESS, GEARY, 3RD AND HOWARD, INCLUDING THOSE STREETS AS REFELECTED ONTHE ATTACHED MAP/SAORD/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/X:RICHARD SHIKMAN, APPEARED SPECIALLY,/CAUSE/BAIL:30,000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/TWA/CONTD:I&A, P&C/DOP/
